mapper.select:
SELECT GATE_CD , BUYER_CD , AI_INQ_NO , ITEM_CD , ITEM_DESC , ITEM_SPEC , MIN_PRICE , AVG_PRICE , CONFIDENCE , ANALYSIS_RESULT , AI_MODEL , (REG_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') AS REG_DATE , GETUSERNAME(GATE_CD, REG_USER_ID, #{ses.langCd}) AS REG_USER_NM FROM STOCAIRH WHERE GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND BUYER_CD = #{ses.companyCd} AND DEL_FLAG = '0'
AND ITEM_CD = #{ITEM_CD}
AND ITEM_DESC LIKE '%' #{ITEM_DESC} '%'
ORDER BY REG_DATE DESC

SELECT GATE_CD , BUYER_CD , AI_INQ_NO , ITEM_CD , ITEM_DESC , ITEM_SPEC , MIN_PRICE , AVG_PRICE , CONFIDENCE , ANALYSIS_RESULT , AI_MODEL , (REG_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS REG_DATE_CHAR , GETUSERNAME(GATE_CD, REG_USER_ID, #{ses.langCd}) AS REG_USER_NM FROM STOCAIRH WHERE GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND BUYER_CD = #{ses.companyCd} AND DEL_FLAG = '0'
AND REG_DATE >= (#{START_DATE})
AND REG_DATE <= (#{END_DATE})
AND UPPER(ITEM_CD) LIKE '%' UPPER(#{ITEM_CD}) '%'
AND UPPER(ITEM_DESC) LIKE '%' UPPER(#{ITEM_DESC}) '%'
AND GETUSERNAME(GATE_CD, REG_USER_ID, #{ses.langCd}) LIKE '%' #{REG_USER_NM} '%'
ORDER BY REG_DATE DESC
